description:
INSURANCE CLAIM REJECTION REASONS ll CLAIM REJECT KYU HOTA HAI || CAR BIKE INSURANCE ll HINDI

Hi
I am Harvinder Singh 

In this video we will discuss how we can protect our claim from getting rejected. What are precautions or steps we can follow to help our claim process.

अक्सर हमारा क्लेम लेने का अनुभव अच्छा नहीं रहता, क्योंकी बीमा कंपनी के नियम की वजह से क्लेम प्रक्रिया काफ़ी मुश्किल हो जाती है और क्लेम रिजेक्ट तक हो जाता है।

 आज के वीडियो में हम जानेगे की किन बातों का ख्याल रख कर क्लेम प्रक्रिया में आने वाली  कठिनाइयों से बचा जा सकता है। 
कृपया वीडियो को पूरा देखें।

#dhcsolutions #hindi #bikeinsuranceclaimreject #carinsuranceclaimreject #insuranceclaimrejectreasons #insurance #claim #carinsurance #bikeinsurance #insurance #carinsurance #bikeinsurance #motorinsurance #vehicleinsurance #insuranceagent #insuranceimpact  @insuranceimpact  #dhcsolutions

Nahi Sir mera aisa matlab nahi hai, maine durghatna k baad sirf insurance se jude part k bare mein bataya hai. 
Kyonki First aid ya accident k baad k precautions k liye ek doctor mujh se behtar bata payenge.
Aapne sahi kaha Jaan hai to jahaan hai !
comments.author: @insuranceimpact

comments.text:
@insuranceimpact  fact ye hai ki aap jitna bhi kar le ye insurance wale koi na koi kami nikal kar claim reject kar dengey. I m suffering from this. Mera total damage claim raject kar diya gaya hai yah kah kar ki gaadi me damage aur reason of accident corroborate nahi kar rahe hai.

Aapka kya vichar hai is par
comments.author: @pp-bq6pu

comments.text:
@pp-bq6pu  Sir Mai apki problem samajh sakta hu. Par hum wo koshish to kar sakte hain jo apne haath mein hai.
Apke case mein, aap ek written application bhejiye post dwara  insurance company ko apni puri baat rakhte hue. Agar unka jawab reject ka hi ata hai to aap insurance ombudsman(bima lokpal) mein apni shikayat de sakte hain. Complaint Post ki receipt proof apne paas jarur rakhiyega.
comments.author: @insuranceimpact

comments.text: @insuranceimpact  written to them over delay and rejection but their reply is same. Irdai proved useless here.
comments.author: @pp-bq6pu

comments.text: @insuranceimpact  bima lok paal hi option bacha hua hai quick solution ke liye
comments.author: @pp-bq6pu

comments.author: @insuranceimpact

comments.text: @insuranceimpact  got my claim through bima lokpal. Insurance co ke ek bhi objection sustain nahi hua jaise 1.mismatch in nature of damage and reason mentioned 2. No of occupant at the time of accident
